ultimatemod.tooltip.auto_torch_placer: Automatically places torches when light is low. Hold in hand.
ultimatemod.tooltip.portable_crafting_ta: Right-click to open a crafting grid anywhere.
ultimatemod.tooltip.instant_smelting_sti: Right-click to instantly smelt all smeltable items in your inventory.
ultimatemod.tooltip.tree_cutter_axe: Chops entire trees in one swing!
ultimatemod.tooltip.backpack: Right-click to access portable storage (27 slots).
